description_long: This sculpture depicts three stylized human figures arranged in a social scene. One figure is seated on a bench, leaning back with an arm resting on the backrest, while the other two figures stand nearby, one facing the seated figure and the other slightly turned. The forms are elongated and abstracted, with simplified facial features and angular limbs, giving the piece a modernist aesthetic. The surface texture is rough and uneven, suggesting it is cast or carved from stone or concrete. The figures are mounted on an irregular, textured base that grounds the composition. The overall impression is one of communal interaction or conversation.
description: A modernist sculpture of three abstracted human figures, one seated and two standing, with rough, stone-like texture. The arrangement suggests a social interaction or conversation.
description_view_0: The front view shows the seated figure facing forward, with two standing figures positioned around it, highlighting the interaction between them.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the backs of the figures, emphasizing the broad shoulders and the rough surface texture, with the bench and base visible.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the back of the central standing figure, with the other two figures partially visible, showing the spatial arrangement.
description_view_3: A side angle that captures the profile of the seated figure and the two standing figures, emphasizing their poses and the bench.
attribute_subject_matter: three abstract human figures in conversation
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a neutral background.
